Off Calendar Jan-21-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Plaintiff And Production Of Documents At Deposition, With Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Hayden S. Alfano
Off Calendar Jan-14-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FASTRUCKING.COM, LLC's Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Plaintiff And Production Of Documents At Deposition, With Request For Sanctions is Off calendar; case settled January 7, 2022.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant, Fastrucking.Com, Llcs Responses To Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of 1,683.50 Against Defe
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Nathaniel Patterson, Esq. (949-656-4601; npatterson@adelsonmclean.com) of Adelson McLean, APC for Plaintiff.
Hayden Alfano, Esq. (213.417.5147; halfano@clarkhill.com) of Clark Hill LLP for Defendant.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DHL EXPRESS (USA), INC.'s Motion To Compel Defendant, Fastrucking.com, LLC's Responses To Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,683.50 Against Defendant.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. The motion is denied as moot. Sanctions are awarded against defendant in the amount of $1,683.50 for abuse of the discovery process.

Order is signed.
